name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Semi sweet Choc pieces; melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9 inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in almond extract.
4. Pour mixture over the crust and spread evenly.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
6. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill.
7. Top cheesecake with pie filling and whipped topping just before serving.
